description: Rule sync definition bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.

notes: Bootstrapped from legacy pipeline ground truth.
All current rule tables are verified; assign a named owner when the operating team is finalized.

tables.name: core.Rule
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleColumn
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleCondition
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleLink
tables.predicate: ruleId IN (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})

tables.name: core.RuleConditionValue
tables.predicate: ruleConditionId IN (SELECT ruleConditionId FROM [core].[RuleCondition] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})))

tables.name: core.DatasetMappingColumn
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN ( (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})) ) )))

tables.name: core.DatasetMapping
tables.predicate: datasetMappingId IN (SELECT datasetMappingId FROM [core].[DatasetMapping] WHERE datasetId_Left IN ( (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})) ) )))

tables.name: core.DatasetColumn
tables.predicate: datasetId IN (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}))))

tables.name: core.Dataset
tables.predicate: datasetId IN (SELECT outputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}) UNION SELECT inputDatasetId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id}))))

tables.name: core.RuleLinkType
tables.predicate: ruleLinkTypeId IN (SELECT ruleLinkTypeId FROM [core].[RuleLink] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})))

tables.name: core.RuleType
tables.predicate: ruleTypeId IN (SELECT ruleTypeId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId IN ( (SELECT ruleId FROM [core].[Rule] WHERE ruleId = {id})))

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected rule scope.

steps.title: Dataset deploy
steps.description: Deploy datasets required by the rule on the target ETL service.
